serves: links[] entries with kind: repository, provider: github
_paik.notes: Official GitHub MCP server, distributed as a container image. GITHUB_PAT should be a fine-grained PAT scoped to the repo(s) listed in your components' repository links. Defaults to read-only (GITHUB_READ_ONLY=1) with a minimal toolset (GITHUB_TOOLSETS) - widen only the specific toolsets/write access an actual workflow needs, per the server's own docs: https://github.com/github/github-mcp-server
